intention: 建立对某个问题的察觉
realLifeExamples: Building awareness of production problems helps me improve my writing skills.
Regular reflection builds awareness of my learning habits.
usageNotes: 常接 problems, mistakes, risks, habits 这类需要被察觉的对象。
productionPrompts: 用 Building awareness of ... helps me ... 造一句和英语学习有关的句子。
